body:
## Summary

Comprehensive audit of the Rust codebase per issue #142, confirming no non-stable features are used and upgrading to the latest Rust edition and best practices.

### Changes

- **Upgrade Rust edition 2021 → 2024** (stable since Rust 1.85, Feb 2025) — zero code changes required for migration
- **Bump MSRV 1.70 → 1.85** — required for edition 2024; downstream users on older toolchains get compatible older versions automatically via the MSRV-aware resolver (Rust 1.84+)
- **Implement `for_each_integer_type!` macro** — resolves the original `// TODO: Create macro foreach` by DRYing up repetitive per-type macro invocations
- **Document IDE alias design decision** — resolves the original `// TODO: Not use alias` by adding a `# Design note` in the `LinkReference` doc comment explaining why supertraits are listed explicitly
- **Move tests to `tests/` directory** — all unit tests moved from `src/imp.rs` to `rust/tests/traits.rs` as proper integration tests
- **Add 8 new integration tests** — covering `ToPrimitive`, `PrimInt` operations, `FromPrimitive`, `Send + Sync`, `Display`, `Hash`, and overflow scenarios (total: 75 integration + 6 doc = 81 tests)
- **Add crate-level documentation** — comprehensive `//!` docs in `lib.rs` with trait summary table and usage example
- **Add automated Rust docs deployment** — new `deploy-rust-docs.yml` workflow that generates `cargo doc` and deploys to the `rust/` subdirectory on `gh-pages` (matching the existing C# docs pattern)
- **Fix CONTRIBUTING.md** — incorrectly stated "nightly toolchain" when the project uses stable
- **Fix rust/README.md** — installation example showed version `0.4` instead of current `0.5`
- **Regenerate Cargo.lock** — was showing version `0.4.0` instead of `0.5.0`
- **Update case study** — detailed audit findings in `docs/case-studies/issue-142/`

### Audit Results

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| Non-stable features | ✅ None found — crate is fully stable Rust |
| Dependencies | ✅ `num-traits 0.2.19` is latest |
| Edition 2024 migration | ✅ Clean — zero code changes |
| Clippy | ✅ Zero warnings |
| Formatting | ✅ Clean |
| Tests | ✅ 75 integration + 6 doc tests pass |
| Documentation sync | ✅ Fixed and enhanced |
| Automated docs CI | ✅ Added `deploy-rust-docs.yml` |

Fixes #142

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo fmt --check` — clean
- [x] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features` — zero warnings
- [x] `cargo test --all-features` — 75 integration + 6 doc tests pass
- [x] `cargo doc --no-deps` — documentation generates successfully
- [x] Verify edition 2024 compiles without migration issues
- [x] Verify no tests remain in `src/` folder

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: feat: upgrade to Rust edition 2024, resolve TODOs, add rustdoc CI
